nodes.name: Every 5 Min
nodes.notes: Matches API spec CRON publish_due_content. At go-live: pick ONE owner of this CRON — either n8n Schedule OR the backend. Don't run both (double-publish risk; see README §F#4).

nodes.name: Mock Insert Run
nodes.notes: MOCK of POST /api/v1/workflow-runs. At go-live: HTTP POST returning {id}.

parameters.jsonOutput: { "data": { "slots": [ { "slot_id": "slot_due_ig_1", "business_id": "biz_test_456", "platform": "instagram", "caption": "Don't let myths hold back your smile! Teeth whitening is safe, effective, and budget-friendly.", "hashtags": ["#TeethWhitening", "#BrightSmile", "#DentalCare"], "asset_url": "https://example.com/whitening_ig.png", "scheduled_at": "2025-06-01T09:00:00Z" }, { "slot_id": "slot_due_li_1", "business_id": "biz_test_456", "platform": "linkedin", "caption": "At Luma Dental Care, we debunk common myths about teeth whitening. Safe, effective treatments mean a brighter smile is within reach.", "hashtags": ["#TeethWhitening", "#DentalCare", "#OralHealth"], "asset_url": "https://example.com/whitening_li.png", "scheduled_at": "2025-06-01T09:00:00Z" } ] } }

nodes.name: Get Due Slots
nodes.notes: MOCK of GET /v1/content/slots?status=approved&scheduled_at__lte=now (cursor-paginated). 2 mock due slots. At go-live: HTTP GET with the filter. Returns approved slots whose scheduled_at is in the past.

nodes.name: Call WF-PUBLISH
nodes.notes: Calls WF-PUBLISH via its PRODUCTION webhook per slot (worker must be Published). Runs once per due slot. Per spec WF-11: at scale add concurrency limits + rate-limit per platform.

nodes.name: Mock Mark Succeeded
nodes.notes: MOCK of PATCH /api/v1/workflow-runs/{run_id} status=succeeded. CRONs don't respond to anyone; this just records the run for observability.
